name: Sarah & Marcus
quote: Rhys captured our wedding day exactly the way it felt — wild, intimate, alive. We kept finding ourselves in his frames before we even posed.

name: The Patel Family
quote: We've done family portraits every year and these are the first ones the kids actually want printed. Rhys made them comfortable in five minutes flat.

name: Jake R.
quote: He hiked the entire ridgeline with me to get one frame. That tells you everything.
